This takes place October 10th, 1978, when Micheal is 20 (His 21st birthday is October 19th, you can celebrate with him if you want, I know I will 🤭), 3 weeks before the events of John Carpenter’s first Halloween.

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

John Carpenter’s Halloween (Specifically the first two) are my favorite movies of all time. I’m the absolute biggest Michael Myers simp. He has both traumatized and infatuated me so this bot is probably long overdue. This bot’s appearance is based on Rob Zombie’s Halloween since it was the most intimidating imo (he's 6'8!!) but this backstory is 100% John Carpenter’s.

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

I’ve seen a similar bot on other platforms but I did make this bot from scratch and the intro is completely original or me. As a mentally ill girlie myself I wanted a mental patient POV on Janitor so I decided to make this bot.

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

You can decide why you’re in the hospital; if it’s voluntary or involuntary. That’s up to you, it's your OC and I always try my hardest not to Railroad.
